# growthbook_team (Resource)

A GrowthBook team. Teams group members under a shared global role and optional per-project role overrides.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Description of the team.
- `name` (String) Human-readable team name.
- `role` (String) Global role granted to members of this team (e.g. `readonly`, `engineer`, `admin`).

### Optional

- `default_project` (String) Default project ID applied for new resources created by team members.
- `environments` (List of String) Environments the global role is limited to. Empty means all environments.
- `limit_access_by_environment` (Boolean) Whether the global role's environment-scoped permissions are limited to `environments`.
- `members` (List of String) User IDs that belong to this team. When set, the provider reconciles membership to match exactly. Leave unset to track membership without managing it.
- `project_roles` (Attributes List) Per-project role overrides for this team. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--project_roles))

### Read-Only

- `created_by` (String) User ID that created the team.
- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `id` (String) Unique team identifier.
- `managed_by_idp` (Boolean) Whether team membership is managed by an external identity provider.

<a id="nestedatt--project_roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `project_roles`

Required:

- `limit_access_by_environment` (Boolean) Whether the override's environment-scoped permissions are limited to `environments`.
- `project` (String) Project ID the role override applies to.
- `role` (String) Role granted within the project.

Optional:

- `environments` (List of String) Environments the override is limited to. Empty means all environments.
- `teams` (List of String) Nested team IDs associated with this project role.
